reviews.comment:
Chica pero completa es una estación después de varios km de Rosario a venado tuerto dónde no encontras otra ACA YPF y se encuentra en plena ruta 33

(Translated by Google)
Small but complete, this station is located several kilometers from Rosario to Venado Tuerto, where you won't find another ACA YPF station, and it's right on Route 33.
